## Checklist

- [ ] `mix test` passes
- [ ] `mix format` clean
- [ ] `mix credo --strict` clean (or new findings explained)
- [ ] `mix dialyzer` clean (or new warnings explained)
- [ ] If a new refactor: golden test + idempotence test + no-op test
- [ ] If user-visible: `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If config/behaviour changed: relevant guide updated in `guides/`
